title: quercus × caduca
intro: Quercus × caduca, also known as the Swamp White Oak, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Quercus genus and is a natural hybrid of the White Oak (Quercus alba) and the Swamp White Oak (Quercus bicolor). This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the bark and leaves, which contain tannins and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × caduca include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Quercus × caduca typically involve drying and processing the bark and leaves into teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
